# Capella test model attribution

`test7_0/` is copied from the [py-capellambse](https://github.com/DSD-DBS/py-capellambse)
test suite (`tests/data/models/test7_0/`).

SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright DB InfraGO AG
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0 (see the `.license` files alongside each model file)

Used by `tools/capella_bridge/roundtrip_test.sh` and the CI round-trip job to
verify the Capella ↔ ArcLang zero-diff round-trip against a real Capella 7.0 model.
